gate_verdicts.reason: Stable, reusable causal noun (standard retail metric). Evidence (store foot traffic / mall visits) matches the name; no banned content; class is reusable across retailers.
Specific reusable cost variable; evidence (per-order fulfillment costs) directly names it. Clean noun form, no state/magnitude in name.

Both companies' quotes describe the same variable — composition of parcel delivery service types (ground vs air; toward next-day). Direction of the shift is state, not meaning; same object, scope, and mechanism, so one driver. Distinct from restaurant_delivery_channel_mix (shipping-mode mix vs order-channel mix), correctly kept separate.
Reusable causal variable: delivery-vs-dine-in share of restaurant orders. Evidence matches; different object/mechanism from parcel_delivery_mix so no fold. Specific and rule-clean.
Standard financial phrase kept whole per R6. Both quotes (comparable sales / same store sales) are the same metric, scope, and mechanism; comparable_sales is a valid synonym variant.
Specific reusable labor-cost variable scoped to store labor; evidence matches. Separate scope from warehouse_hourly_wages, so no fold.
Specific reusable labor-cost variable scoped to warehouse labor; evidence matches. Different scope from store_hourly_wages — keep separate, never SAME_AS.
